channel.title: Pattaya Gym Directory - Naklua venues
channel.description: Latest gyms, Muay Thai, dive, golf, and sport venues in Naklua, Pattaya.

item.title: One-D Yoga Studio
item.description: Modern multi-style yoga studio at 571/32 Naklua 16/2 offering daily Hatha, Vinyasa Flow, and Yin classes plus private sessions, workshops, and weekend / weeklong retreats.

item.title: Deep Climbing Gym (Harbor Pattaya)
item.description: Pattaya's first indoor climbing gym. Air-conditioned, 10m wall, ocean theme. Top rope, auto-belay, lead, bouldering routes.

item.title: AF Academy Football School Pattaya
item.description: From age 3 — youngest accepted in Pattaya football. Multi-location. Russian/English/Thai. Indoor + outdoor fields.

item.title: Pattaya Bike and Boat Tours
item.description: Guided bicycle + boat tour operator. Quiet back-road routes through real Thai villages, plantations, fishing communities. Small-group English-speaking tours. Bike rental also available. Naklua-based.

item.title: Wong Amat Beach — Naklua / Pattaya's Family Swimming Beach
item.description: Pattaya quietest, cleanest, most family-friendly main beach. ~1.5km long Naklua coastline with safe-swim zone, beach volleyball court, jet ski + banana boat (central section). Walking distance to Centara Grand Mirage, Cape Dara, and Sanctuary of Truth. Free.

item.title: Bangkok Hospital Pattaya — Sports Rehabilitation & Wellness
item.description: BDMS-network JCI-accredited international hospital. Rehabilitation Center for sports/orthopedic/neuro injuries. Prestige Wellness Anti-Aging Center with DNA fitness profiling and weight management. Medical anchor for Pattaya sport tourism.

item.title: Sanctuary of Truth — Wood Temple & Cultural-Sport Park
item.description: Pattaya iconic 105m all-teak wood temple, hand-carved without nails since 1981, still under active construction. On-site activities: horseback riding, speed boat tours, traditional Thai water-skill performance, walking grounds. Naklua peninsula setting.

item.title: Fairtex Training Center Pattaya
item.description: World's largest Muay Thai resort camp. 9 rings, 17 trainers, on-site hotel & 25m pool. Champions: Yodsanklai, Stamp, Smilla Sundell, Saemapetch.

item.title: Sityodtong Pattaya
item.description: Founded 1960 by Kru Yodtong. 57+ world champions including Samart Payakaroon. Trained Rob Kaman & Ramon Dekkers. Pilgrimage destination.

item.title: SUN Fitness Pattaya (3 branches)
item.description: 3-branch chain across Pattaya — single membership accesses all. Soi Buakhao + Naklua branches.

item.title: Nok Yoga Pattaya
item.description: Naklua / Pattaya-Naklua Road yoga studio offering Hatha, Vinyasa, and traditional Thai Reusi Dat Ton stretching for all levels with some sessions at Jomtien Beach.

item.title: Naklua Public Swimming Pool
item.description: City-operated public swimming pool in Naklua / North Pattaya offering affordable lap-swim and recreational access with kids' pool, changing rooms, and resident discounts.

item.title: Centara Grand Mirage Beach Resort
item.description: 5-star Lost World themed family resort. On-site water park + 230m private beach + Spa Cenvaree (24 rooms) + rock climbing wall + 2 tennis + Pilates/aqua/kayaking.

item.title: Cape Dara Resort
item.description: 5-star beach-cliff luxury. Infinity pool + Luminous Spa + mineral bath + sauna + steam + beauty centre + fitness with yoga classes.
